purpose: Extension entrypoint. Wires up the workspace context store, settings webview, command surface, file watchers (.json/.json.update sidecars, .cwd, ~/.claude, ~/.codex), and forwards activation/deactivation to the AI Understanding subsystem (aiu.js).
invariants: aiu.activate() is wrapped in try/catch so AIU subsystem failure does not break the rest of the extension.
Every registered command and watcher is pushed to context.subscriptions for VS Code to dispose on deactivate.
trackedWsState wraps raw wsState so any ACTIVE_KEY mutation refreshes the status bar AND the settings webview.
On activation, a one-time sweep consumes any orphan *.json.update sidecars left from prior sessions.
Permission watcher mutations to ~/.claude/settings.json or ~/.codex/config.toml are debounced and re-applied.
gotchas: activate() is ~1500 lines — order of setup matters (statusBar must exist before trackedWsState, etc.).
Two state surfaces: wsState (raw VS Code state) vs trackedWsState (wrapper with side effects); always use the wrapper for mutations.
execSync `git log` / `git status` timeouts at 4000ms; failures swallowed silently — do not assume git is reachable.
aiu.deactivate() called inside try/catch in deactivate() — failures here are non-fatal but the watcher may leak briefly.
